body:
This PR changes the activateOnFocus to be false in the TabsList component and also makes the pointer activating behavior follow the prop (by default it activates the tabs on click, but if the prop is applied it activates on pointer down).

Closes https://github.com/mui/base-ui/issues/2006

title: [tabs] Change `activateOnFocus` to false
